---
title: Code Blocks with No Language Tag
status: published
---

# Plain Code Blocks

A code block with no language specified:

```
function plainCodeBlock() {
  this could be anything
  could be pseudocode
  could be plaintext
  output from a command
  or anything else
}
```

Another plain code block:

```
SELECT * FROM users WHERE active = true;
LIMIT 10;
```

Mixed with a typed code block:

```python
def typed_block():
    return "this one has a language"
```

And another plain one:

```
Plain text content
Not syntax highlighted
Just raw lines
```

A code block with only whitespace:

```
   
```

Another code block with indented content:

```
    function indented() {
      return true;
    }
```

End of document.
